phrases.intent_en: Ask for a café on the shaded side of the Cours
phrases.text_local: Je cherche un café à l'ombre côté nord du Cours Mirabeau.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh SHEHRSH uhn kah-FAY ah LOHM-bruh koh-TAY NOR doo KOOR mee-rah-BOH
phrases.cultural_note: The north side of the Cours, shaded by plane trees, is the café side. The most historic establishment is Les Deux Garçons (founded 1792), frequented by Cézanne, Zola, and later by Picasso and Sartre. The terrasse here is the social heart of Aix.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the mansions on the south side
phrases.text_local: Les hôtels particuliers du côté sud sont-ils visibles de la rue ?
phrases.pronunciation: layz oh-TEL par-tee-koo-LYAY doo koh-TAY SOO sohn-TEEL vee-ZEE-bluh duh lah ROO
phrases.cultural_note: The south side of the Cours Mirabeau is lined with 17th and 18th century private mansions — some of the finest Baroque architecture in Provence. They are private residences; you can admire the facades freely from the pavement.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Saturday market near the Cours
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un marché le samedi près du Cours Mirabeau ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn mar-SHAY luh sahm-DEE preh doo KOOR mee-rah-BOH
phrases.cultural_note: The Saturday market is the grandest in Aix, spreading across Place Richelme, Place des Prêcheurs, and Avenue Victor Hugo near the Rotonde. Arrive by 8h for the freshest produce; the market winds down by 13h.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy the best calissons near the Cours
phrases.text_local: Où acheter les meilleurs calissons près du Cours Mirabeau ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ash-TAY lay meh-YUHR kah-lee-SOHN preh doo KOOR mee-rah-BOH
phrases.cultural_note: Roy René has a flagship boutique on the Cours Mirabeau where you can watch calissons being made through a glass window. Bechard and Léonard Parli on the adjacent streets are also highly regarded confectioners.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about evening entertainment along the Cours
phrases.text_local: Que se passe-t-il sur le Cours Mirabeau le soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh suh PAHS-teel soor luh KOOR mee-rah-BOH luh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: The Cours Mirabeau comes alive in the evening with café terrasses filling with locals, street musicians in summer, and frequent outdoor events during the July opera festival. It is one of the liveliest promenades in the south of France after dark.
